# Muktabodha Digital Library — registration note

**Date:** 2026-05-19
**Branch:** corpus/external-unblock-2026-05-19

Lane 5 did **not** attempt to register a Muktabodha account in this run (per task instructions).

## Access details (for the next session)

- Catalogue index: `https://muktabodha.org/digital_library.htm`
- Alternate catalogue host: `https://muktalib7.com/DL_CATALOG_ROOT/digital_library.htm`
- Project announcement (IFP-Pondicherry Śaiva-Siddhānta collaboration): `https://muktabodha.org/75-saiva-texts-in-new-project-with-ifp-2/`
- **Registration:** required (free, e-mail confirmation). The library is "freely accessible after registration" per `docs/ACQUISITION_PATHWAYS.md` §B.5 / §B.6.

## What Muktabodha holds that we want

1. **KSTS-75 series** — 75 Kashmir-Śaiva volumes digitised by Muktabodha. **Already partially covered via egangotri/archive.org**: Lane 5 fetched 7 core KSTS PDFs (Tantrāloka, Paramārtha-Sāra, Tantrasāra, IPV pt. 1+2, Pratyabhijñā-Hṛdaya pt. 1, Śiva-Sūtra-Vimarśinī) — see `data/external/muktabodha_via_egangotri/` and `data/external_ingest_manifest_lane5.json`.
2. **IFP-Pondicherry Śaiva-Siddhānta e-text bundle** — over 2,000 mostly Śaiva-Siddhānta texts. Includes Kāmika-Āgama, Kāraṇa-Āgama, Mataṅga-Pārameśvara-Āgama, Mṛgendra-Āgama, Pauṣkara-Āgama, Raurava-Āgama; Sarvajñānottara; Nareśvara-Parīkṣā; Tattva-Saṅgraha of Sadyojyotis. **No archive.org backup known** — Muktabodha is the only open digital source.

## Recommendation for next session

A. Register at https://muktabodha.org with project e-mail.
B. Once authenticated, download the IFP-Pondicherry Śaiva-Siddhānta e-text bundle (B.6 in `ACQUISITION_PATHWAYS.md`) — this is the unique-to-Muktabodha content that is *not* mirrored on archive.org/egangotri.
C. Cross-check the seven KSTS volumes we already pulled in Lane 5 against the Muktabodha critical e-text versions (Muktabodha encoded canonical KSTS as searchable e-texts; archive.org has the printed scans). The Muktabodha e-texts are the higher-quality digital witness.

## Lane 5 fetch posture

- Direct Muktabodha download: **deferred** (registration not attempted this run).
- KSTS subset via archive.org/egangotri: **fetched** — 7 PDFs, ~80 MB. See manifest.
- Remaining 68 KSTS volumes: **manifest-only** — fetch only when the specific work becomes engaged.
